original_prompt: 给这套产品穿戴在一个欧洲模特身上，场景白色博物馆建筑，要求场景明亮，模特摆好姿势，专业摄影
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
"A professional high-end fashion photography shot featuring an elegant European female model. She is wearing the specific [Subject Lock] bridal jewelry set: a high-profile silver tiara with scalloped peaks on her head, a V-shaped statement necklace with a pear-shaped drop resting on her collarbones, and matching chandelier earrings. The jewelry sparkles intensely against her skin. The setting is a bright, white museum interior with grand architectural lines, marble columns, and high ceilings. The lighting is soft, high-key natural light, creating a clean, airy, and luxurious atmosphere. The model poses gracefully, looking like a piece of living art."

[Text & UI Layout]
"***Layout Style**: Minimalist Editorial (极简杂志风).
Text Rendering Instructions:
1. **Mood Title**: Content: “光影加冕” (Crowned by Light). Style: [Elegant Serif, Thin weight]. Position: [Floating in the clean white negative space of the museum wall].
2. **Description**: Content: “凝固永恒的奢华美学” (Solidifying the eternal luxury aesthetics). Style: [Modern Sans-serif, small tracking].
"
layout_logic: Since the background is a 'white museum architecture', there will be ample clean, bright negative space (white walls or marble floors). Place the text in these open areas to maintain a 'high-end magazine' look without obstructing the jewelry details. Use dark grey or silver foil color for the font to contrast elegantly with the white background.
